subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! The Tongue of Grandeur and Loving-kindness maketh mention of thee from the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من و دختر کنیز من لسان عظمت و عنایت از افق اعلی ترا ذکر مینماید و
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @high station of the true believer, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
